data.name: Asa-Chan Wants to Go Home!
data.detailed_description:
"Asa-Chan Wants to Go Home!" is an RPG game produced by プラスカゼット and published by Hanabi games.



This is a small adventure story... Asanuma Sayaka is an ordinary girl, but one day, she is suddenly transported to another world and becomes a hero. Here, she faces a tremendous challenge...

Players will control the main character, Asanuma Sayaka, to challenge the legendary "Disaster Witch". Along the way, she will encounter obstacles from demons, but there's also a chance to get along well with them...







  • Jrpg
  • Captivating story

Players will control the main character, Asanuma Sayaka, to challenge the legendary "Disaster Witch". Along the way, she will encounter obstacles from demons, but there's also a chance to get along well with them...

data.short_description: This is a small adventure story... Asanuma Sayaka is an ordinary girl, but one day, she is suddenly transported to another world and becomes a hero. Here, she faces a tremendous challenge...

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
